results.title: Diversity-preserving selection in evolutionary algorithms
results.content: Selection pressure that biases toward diversity rather than fitness alone helps populations avoid premature convergence to local optima.

results.title: Load balancing in Mixture-of-Experts routing
results.content: Routing collapse — where the gate concentrates on a small subset of experts — is a primary failure mode of MoE training; auxiliary losses encourage balanced utilization.

results.title: Bounded-population agent evolution
results.content: Doppl-style agent runtimes use finite caps on population, generations, energy, and depth to make evolution loops tractable for live demos.
